name: Tiropetes (Cheese Rolls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Add yolks and continue beating until well blended.
3. Gradually add the cheese mixture and mix thoroughly.
4. Cut pastry sheets into quarters or 8x6-inch pieces.
5. Brush each piece with hot melted butter.
6. Place a teaspoon of the cheese mixture in the center of each pastry strip.
7. Fold one-third of the pastry over on each side, then brush again with butter.
8. Roll the pastry tightly like a jellyroll.
9. Arrange on baking sheets and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
Note: Tiropites can be frozen before baking. Do not thaw; bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
